offer_name: AI Entity Launch Kit: Afterparty Edition

buyer_facing_offer_draft.headline: Turn your AI agent idea into a safe, forkable entity launch kit.
audience: indie creators with an agent concept
small teams needing a proof vault
hackathon builders preparing a private demo
deliverables: proof ledger linking claims to files
private demo script and launch checklist
not_included_without_approval: public posting beyond existing approved Pages/GitHub workflows
GPU training or paid provider runs
buyer_facing_offer_draft.call_to_action_draft: Reply with the entity name, audience, and one proof artifact; I will prepare a private demo kit for awake review.

buyer_qualification_checklist.purpose: Help the awake operator decide whether a private demo is worth approving before any outreach, payment link, or delivery action exists.
must_confirm_before_contact: The buyer asked for or explicitly welcomed a private demo.
The buyer can provide at least one non-secret proof artifact or public project link.
The buyer understands this is a verifier-backed prep kit, not a live deployment or guaranteed revenue result.
The awake operator has chosen a price tier and approved the exact message/channel.
disqualifiers: requests for wallets, seed phrases, payment custody, KYC, or guaranteed earnings
requests to upload private data, start GPU training, or run paid providers before approval
requests to imply OpenAI/event/sponsor affiliation or already-earned revenue

beats.speaker_note: Name the entity idea and repeat that this is a private, approval-gated proof walkthrough.
Show the payload, logo seed dataset, and static site as repo-local proof, not as a public launch claim.
Walk through the offer-builder, proof-ledger, and demo-router tools using closed-gate language.
Ask the awake operator to approve exactly one next action: private demo, first-dollar offer, public page polish, or dataset upload check.

forbidden_lines: Do not say revenue was earned.
Do not imply event, OpenAI, or sponsor affiliation.
Do not promise outreach, payment setup, GPU training, or upload execution without human approval.

buyer_objection_responses.objection: Is this already a live paid service?
buyer_objection_responses.safe_response: No. It is a verifier-backed private launch kit draft; payment and outreach stay closed until an awake approval step.

buyer_objection_responses.objection: Can you train or upload my data tonight?
buyer_objection_responses.safe_response: Not unattended. This package can prepare manifests and verification steps, while upload, GPU, and training require explicit human approval.
Use the proof ledger paths and verifier command to inspect repo-local payload, site, dataset, and offer artifacts before any public claim.

private_demo_acceptance_checklist.purpose: Give the awake operator a pass/fail gate before any private demo, payment discussion, outreach, upload, GPU/training, or public posting action is approved.
must_pass_before_demo: The proof ledger still labels only verified repo-local claims as green.
The exact buyer/recipient and channel were selected by an awake operator.
The demo script forbidden lines are reviewed and kept out of spoken/written copy.
No checkout/payment URL, outreach automation, wallet, GPU/training job, or private upload is enabled.
The verifier command passes immediately before the demo is delivered.

wake_operator_checkout_decision_matrix.purpose: Give the awake operator a bounded go/no-go table before creating any checkout link, outreach message, or public post.

decision_options.recommended_when: The buyer has not requested pricing yet or proof still needs private walkthrough review.
decision_options.allowed_next_step: Use the private demo script and acceptance checklist only after recipient/channel approval.

decision_options.recommended_when: A real person has explicitly asked to buy after reviewing proof and scope.
decision_options.allowed_next_step: Awake operator may choose a manual payment workflow outside unattended mode.

decision_options.recommended_when: Proof paths, demo fit, or buyer scope are not strong enough for a paid ask.
decision_options.allowed_next_step: Add repo-local proof, verifier coverage, or clearer demo docs only.

wake_operator_checkout_decision_matrix.verification_note: Run PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/verify_entity_pipeline.py immediately before any awake operator uses this matrix.

local_lead_scoring_rubric.purpose: Rank locally supplied, human-approved leads before any contact, payment discussion, or public posting is approved.

score_bands.label: private_demo_candidate
score_bands.safe_next_step: Prepare a private demo packet for awake operator approval only.

score_bands.label: needs_more_proof
score_bands.safe_next_step: Collect or map more repo-local proof before proposing any buyer contact.

score_bands.label: do_not_contact_unattended
score_bands.safe_next_step: Keep building proof; do not draft outreach for this lead.

criteria.evidence_required: Buyer explicitly requested or welcomed a private demo.
At least one non-secret proof artifact or public project link is available.
Requested outcome matches payload, proof-ledger, demo-script, or launch-checklist deliverables.
No wallet, KYC, guaranteed revenue, private upload, GPU/training, or affiliation claim is requested.
Awake operator has time to review proof and approve exact recipient/channel.

forbidden_uses: scraping or enriching leads without approval
claiming revenue, affiliation, or live deployment
starting GPU/training jobs or uploading private data
local_lead_scoring_rubric.verification_note: Verifier asserts this rubric stays draft-only, bounded to local/human-supplied leads, and keeps payment/outreach/spend/public posting closed.

wake_operator_private_demo_packet.purpose: Give the awake operator a single bounded packet to approve before any private demo, buyer message, payment discussion, public post, upload, GPU/training, or outreach action.
wake_operator_private_demo_packet.operator_script_intro: This is a private, verifier-backed proof walkthrough. It has not earned revenue, does not imply affiliation, and does not enable payments, outreach, upload, GPU, or training without a separate awake approval.

demo_assets.label: entity identity
demo_assets.use: ground the entity role and boundaries

demo_assets.label: proof ledger
demo_assets.use: show which claims are green vs yellow

demo_assets.label: first-dollar offer draft
demo_assets.use: show price ladder and acceptance gates as drafts

demo_assets.label: public explainer page
demo_assets.use: show existing static proof surface without making new public claims

three_minute_flow: 30s — state private/demo-only scope and closed gates.
60s — open proof ledger and point at one green claim plus one yellow claim that still needs approval.
60s — show the tool suite contracts and explain that money/outreach/upload/GPU switches are false.
30s — ask the awake operator to pick private_demo_only, manual_invoice_after_yes, or keep_building_proof.
forbidden_until_approval: uploading private data or publishing datasets
wake_operator_private_demo_packet.verification_note: Run PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/verify_entity_pipeline.py and git diff --check before any awake operator uses this packet.

buyer_proof_faq.purpose: Answer common buyer proof questions with exact repo-local evidence before any outreach, checkout, public post, upload, GPU/training, or revenue claim is approved.

questions.question: What can I verify without trusting a sales claim?
questions.safe_answer: Inspect the proof ledger, tool-suite manifest, and verifier output. Green claims must point to repo-local files; yellow claims remain unapproved until a human verifies them.

questions.question: Is this already earning money or affiliated with an event/company?
questions.safe_answer: No. The offer is a prep-only private demo draft. It does not claim revenue, sponsorship, OpenAI/event affiliation, or a live checkout.

questions.question: Can the logo-seed dataset be uploaded or trained on now?
questions.safe_answer: Not unattended. The local dataset lane has metadata and a streaming-check handoff, but upload, public release, GPU, model downloads, and training remain closed until an awake approval.

questions.question: What exact next action can an operator approve?
questions.safe_answer: Pick one bounded route from the decision matrix: private_demo_only, manual_invoice_after_yes, or keep_building_proof. Any external delivery/payment step needs a named recipient/channel/scope and expiration.

forbidden_claims: Hugging Face remote streaming is verified before an awake upload check passes
buyer_proof_faq.verification_note: Run PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/verify_entity_pipeline.py and git diff --check before using this FAQ in any buyer-facing channel.

post_demo_outcome_capture.purpose: Give the awake operator a local receipt and go/no-go router after a private demo, before any follow-up, invoice, checkout/payment link, upload, GPU/training, or public claim is approved.

router_rules.safe_next_step: Awake operator may draft a manual invoice workflow outside unattended mode only after verifying buyer identity, exact scope, and price tier.
Add repo-local proof or verifier coverage before any follow-up message is approved.
Run local dataset checks only; private Hugging Face upload/remote streaming verification requires a separate awake approval and secure token environment.
Record the local receipt and stop; do not send follow-up unattended.

forbidden_until_approval: claiming revenue before payment is verified
uploading private data or publishing datasets
post_demo_outcome_capture.verification_note: Run PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/verify_entity_pipeline.py and git diff --check before using this receipt/router in any buyer-facing workflow.

wake_operator_scope_quote_sheet.purpose: Convert an interested post-demo outcome into a bounded scope/quote worksheet for awake operator review before any invoice, checkout URL, follow-up, upload, GPU/training, or public claim exists.
allowed_use_cases: summarize the buyer problem after an approved private demo
map requested deliverables to repo-local proof paths
choose a draft price tier from the existing price_ladder without collecting payment
list missing approvals before any manual invoice or message is prepared

tier_guidance.scope: proof-ledger review and one private demo packet only
payload manifest, verifier handoff, and tool-suite summary for one entity concept
private launch kit: proof ledger, offer draft, demo script, static-site manifest notes, and safety gates

explicit_exclusions_required: no unattended outreach or follow-up sending
no revenue or affiliation claim until independently verified
no Hugging Face upload/public dataset release/private media movement
no GPU/training/model downloads or paid provider spend
forbidden_until_approval: claiming revenue before payment is verified
uploading private data or publishing datasets
wake_operator_scope_quote_sheet.verification_note: Run PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/verify_entity_pipeline.py and git diff --check before using this scope/quote worksheet in any buyer-facing workflow.

private_demo_delivery_receipt_kit.purpose: Give the awake operator a local/manual delivery receipt template after an approved private demo, before any follow-up, invoice, checkout/payment link, upload, GPU/training, or public claim is allowed.
operator_attestations_required: The demo recipient/channel were approved while awake before delivery.
Only repo-local proof paths were shown or claimed.
No checkout/payment URL, invoice, follow-up message, upload, GPU/training job, model download, public post, or revenue/affiliation claim was created during the receipt step.
The verifier command passed before relying on this receipt for any next decision.
forbidden_until_approval: claiming revenue before payment is verified
uploading private data or publishing datasets
private_demo_delivery_receipt_kit.verification_note: Run PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/verify_entity_pipeline.py and git diff --check before using this delivery receipt in any buyer-facing workflow.

wake_operator_next_action_router.purpose: After a private demo receipt, scope/quote worksheet, or dataset question exists, route the awake operator to exactly one approved next action while keeping all money/outreach/upload/GPU/training gates closed until a separate human yes.

route_options.recommended_when: Proof paths are missing, yellow, stale, or not yet verifier-covered.
route_options.allowed_repo_only_action: Add or tighten local proof paths, docs, manifests, or verifier assertions.

route_options.recommended_when: A specific recipient/channel/message path was approved while awake after a successful private demo.
route_options.allowed_repo_only_action: Prepare a draft follow-up message file for review; do not send it unattended.

route_options.recommended_when: A real buyer explicitly asked to buy and the awake operator selected scope plus tier.
route_options.allowed_repo_only_action: Record the approved manual-invoice planning checklist path; do not create checkout URLs or invoices unattended.

route_options.recommended_when: The buyer/operator asks about the logo-seed dataset and approves a private-default HF upload/streaming check later.
route_options.allowed_repo_only_action: Run only local parse/open-image checks now; remote HF upload/streaming requires secure token environment and awake approval.

forbidden_until_approval: claiming revenue before payment is verified
uploading private data or publishing datasets
printing HF tokens or credential-store contents
wake_operator_next_action_router.verification_note: Run PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/verify_entity_pipeline.py and git diff --check before using this next-action router in any buyer-facing workflow.

private_followup_draft_template.purpose: Prepare a single private follow-up message draft only after an awake-approved demo receipt and next-action route, without sending, scheduling, invoicing, uploading, posting, or claiming revenue.
private_followup_draft_template.allowed_trigger: wake_operator_next_action_router.route_id == approve_private_followup_draft with approved recipient, channel, message path, and expiration supplied by an awake operator
message_constraints: State this is a private follow-up draft for an already-approved demo context only.
Reference only repo-local proof paths that exist and were shown or approved.
Ask for one bounded next decision instead of pushing urgency or guaranteed outcomes.
Include the line: payment, invoice, upload, public posting, GPU/training, and revenue claims remain closed until a separate human approval.
forbidden_until_approval: claiming revenue before payment is verified
uploading private data or publishing datasets
printing HF tokens or credential-store contents
private_followup_draft_template.verification_note: Run PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/verify_entity_pipeline.py and git diff --check before any awake operator copies this follow-up draft into an external channel.

wake_operator_manual_invoice_planning_ch.purpose: Convert an approved next-action route into a local/manual invoice planning checklist without creating, sending, scheduling, or collecting payment while unattended.
wake_operator_manual_invoice_planning_ch.allowed_trigger: wake_operator_next_action_router.route_id == approve_manual_invoice_planning with approved buyer/receipt, scope, tier, manual invoice workflow path, and expiration supplied by an awake operator
required_preconditions: A real buyer explicitly asked to buy after reviewing proof.
The awake operator selected approve_manual_invoice_planning in the next-action router.
The selected price tier maps to an existing scope/quote proof path.
The verifier command passes before any external invoice workflow is prepared.
manual_invoice_copy_constraints: Use this checklist only as a local planning artifact; do not create or send invoices unattended.
State that payment collection, invoice sending, checkout links, revenue claims, uploads, public posting, and GPU/training remain closed until a separate human approval.
Do not imply OpenAI/event/sponsor affiliation or guaranteed revenue.
Attach only repo-local proof paths that exist and were approved by the awake operator.
forbidden_until_approval: claiming revenue before payment is verified
uploading private data or publishing datasets
printing HF tokens or credential-store contents
wake_operator_manual_invoice_planning_ch.verification_note: Run PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/verify_entity_pipeline.py and git diff --check before any awake operator uses this checklist outside the repo.

local_lead_schema.notes: local identifier only; no scraping required

dataset_release_readiness.purpose: Prepare the 10-image logo seed lane for an awake operator to review before any Hugging Face upload, private media movement, or training job.
dataset_release_readiness.image_dimensions_policy: all current logo seed images are verified square PNG concepts before release use
pre_release_checklist: Review the contact sheet and individual PNGs for unwanted text/logo artifacts.
Confirm captions are non-secret and match image intent.
If approved while awake, upload privately first and verify remote row/file count before any public claim.

hf_dataset_streaming_check_plan.purpose: Prepare an awake operator to validate the logo-seed image/text lane locally and, only after approval, verify a private Hugging Face dataset stream without starting upload, GPU, model download, or training during unattended runs.
local_checks: Parse datasets/logo-seed/metadata.jsonl and confirm exactly 10 rows.
Open every referenced PNG with PIL and verify 1024x1024 dimensions.
Confirm every caption is non-empty and references Afterparty Forge 2045.
Run PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/verify_entity_pipeline.py before packaging or upload.

checks: Remote file list includes README.md, metadata.jsonl, and images/*.png.
datasets.load_dataset(repo_id, streaming=True, token=token) yields the expected file_name and text fields.

forbidden_until_approval: printing HF tokens or credential-store contents
claiming remote streaming is verified before an awake upload check passes
hf_dataset_streaming_check_plan.human_handoff: If the awake operator approves a private HF upload later, run the local checks first, upload privately with an environment token that is never printed, then record repo_id/private/file_count/streaming status in this proof repo.

wake_operator_handoff_integrity_checklis.purpose: Before any awake operator uses the private follow-up, manual invoice planning, HF dataset check, or buyer proof FAQ lanes, confirm the handoff still matches repo-local proof and every external action remains separately approval-gated.
must_confirm_before_external_use: The selected route has a matching tool contract with money_actions_enabled=false, external_delivery_enabled=false, and training_or_gpu_enabled=false.
Every proof path referenced by the selected buyer-facing draft exists in the repo at review time.
The static site and docs mirror still say money actions remain closed until human approval.
The verifier command passes after any edits and before any manual use.
No checkout/payment URL, invoice creation, follow-up send, HF upload, token print, public post, GPU/training, model download, spend, wallet, or cron mutation was performed unattended.
forbidden_until_approval: claiming revenue before payment is verified
Hugging Face upload or public dataset release
printing HF tokens or credential-store contents
wake_operator_handoff_integrity_checklis.verification_note: Run PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 scripts/verify_entity_pipeline.py and git diff --check before any awake operator uses a revenue/data handoff outside the repo.

must_confirm_before_snapshot_use: The evidence snapshot is local/private review material and is not sent, posted, or used as payment copy unattended.
The verifier command passed after the latest repo edits and before the snapshot is referenced externally.
Every proof path in the selected handoff exists and matches a green/yellow truth label from the proof ledger.
The static site/docs mirror still shows closed-gate language for revenue/data handoffs.
No checkout/payment URL, invoice creation, follow-up send, HF upload, token print, public post, GPU/training, model download, spend, wallet, or cron mutation was performed unattended.
If operator_notes_path is used, it must be based on docs/revenue/EVIDENCE_SNAPSHOT_OPERATOR_NOTES_TEMPLATE.md and kept local/private until a separate awake approval.

Hugging Face upload or public dataset release
printing HF tokens or credential-store contents
